name_en: 🌷 Style No. 735145. The new GG brand collections continue the design philosophy that items should not only be trendy for one season but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to infuse the brand's iconic charm into new designs. This Ophidia small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas material and is equipped with double G accessories.
name_cn:
🌷 Style No. 735145. The new GG brand collections continue the design philosophy that items should not only be trendy for one season but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to infuse the brand's iconic charm into new designs. This Ophidia small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas material and is equipped with double G accessories.
Hidden Details
Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas
Brown leather trim
Double G
Adjustable top handle
Top zip closure
Made in Italy
